title: Task Schema
description: Defines a task — a runtime instance of a task template, representing a specific unit of work being performed by an actor on a resource, with state tracking and lifecycle management.

examples.name: Approve Loan Application #456
examples.description: Loan officer approves a borrower's loan application

context.approvalNotes: All documentation verified, credit score acceptable

examples.name: Verify Income for Loan Application #456
examples.description: System verifies borrower income documentation against provided sources

error.message: Income documentation could not be verified with provided sources
error.details: W-2 forms do not match employment verification response

id.description: Unique identifier for this task instance.

name.description: Human-readable name for this specific task instance.

key.description: Programmatic identifier for this task instance, suitable for use in code and APIs.

type.description: Identifies this as a task instance.

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this specific task is doing.

operation.description: Reference to the operation (key) that defines this task's resource, action, capabilities, and lifecycle.

actor.description: The specific actor performing this task (e.g., 'borrower-789', 'loanOfficer-234').

resource.description: The specific resource being acted upon (e.g., 'loan-123', 'loanApplication-456').

state.description: Current state of the task instance (e.g., 'pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled'). Must be one of the states defined in the task template's lifecycle.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task instance was created.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task instance transitioned to 'in_progress' state.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task instance successfully completed.

failedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task instance transitioned to 'failed' state.

cancelledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task instance was cancelled.

context.description: Optional execution context containing parameters, configuration, or state specific to this task instance.

error.description: Error information if the task failed.
